reason: All acceptance criteria verified. GroundingResult(grounded,score,reason,best_match_index) frozen dataclass. Cosine similarity pure function with zero-vector protection. GroundingChecker with injectable embedding_fn, default threshold=0.75. Empty source_texts -> grounded=False, reason=no_source. Multiple sources select best match. Configurable threshold via constructor. All 17/17 tests pass. Coverage 90%.
